items.title: Humana Earnings Will Shed More Light on Medicare Prospects
items.description: Humana shares are down more than 30% since the federal government announced plans last month to keep Medicare Advantage rates nearly flat in 2027.

items.title: CVS Reiterates 2026 Profit Outlook, Shares Slide 3.7% Despite Q4 Beat
items.description: The company maintained its 2026 earnings forecast, with guidance falling short of expectations despite stronger fourth-quarter results.

items.title: Salesforce and 10 More Stocks That Have Cratered and Look Like Buys
items.description: Evercore strategist Julian Emanuel listed a bunch of examples.  A cohort of other healthcare stocks have been crushed as well, including providers of data-centric tools that pharmaceutical companies use to create new drugs.

items.title: UnitedHealth: After The Collapse
items.description: UnitedHealth Group Incorporated guides 2026 revenue to $439 billion, down from $448 billion. Click here to read why UNH stock is a Buy.

items.title: Here’s What Happened to UnitedHealth Group (UNH)
items.description: Ruane, Cunniff LP, an investment adviser managing Sequoia Strategy, released its Q4 2025 investor letter. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. Sequoia Strategy returned 9% in Q4 compared to 2.7% for the S&P 500 Index. The Strategy delivered a return of 21.9% in 2025 versus 17.9% for the Index. In a year […]
